self = <data.candidate_generator.CandidateGenerator object at 0x0000020034622510>

    def get_page_1_data(self) -> CandidatePage1DTO:
        # --- 1. XỬ LÝ LOGIC ĐỊA CHỈ (Mapping Tỉnh -> Phường) ---
        p_addr = self.p.get("address_info", {})
    
        # Chọn Tỉnh thường trú
        perm_prov = p_addr.get("perm_province") or random.choice(list(self.db["location_map"].keys()))
        # Chọn Phường thuộc Tỉnh đó
        available_wards = self.db["location_map"].get(perm_prov, ["Phường mặc định"])
        perm_ward = p_addr.get("perm_ward") or random.choice(available_wards)
    
        # --- 2. THÔNG TIN CÔNG VIỆC ---
        job_info = JobInfoDTO(
            job_apply=self._get_val("job_info", "job_apply", self.db["job_info"]["job_apply"]),
            expertise=self._get_val("job_info", "expertise", self.db["job_info"]["expertise"]),
            rank=self._get_val("job_info", "rank", self.db["job_info"]["rank"]),
            work_location=self.p["job_info"].get("work_location") or "Thành Phố Hồ Chí Minh (VN)",
            job_opening=self._get_val("job_info", "job_opening", self.db["job_info"]["job_opening"])
        )
    
        # --- 3. THÔNG TIN CÁ NHÂN ---
        p_pers = self.p.get("personal_info", {})
        gender = p_pers.get("gender") or random.choice(["Nam", "Nữ"])
    
        # Xử lý Avatar Path (Dùng path tuyệt đối để tránh lỗi hệ thống)
        default_avt = os.path.abspath("data/assets/default_avatar.jpg")
        final_avatar = p_pers.get("avatar_path") or default_avt
    
        personal_info = PersonalInfoDTO(
            avatar_path=final_avatar,
            full_name=p_pers.get("full_name") or (fake.name_male() if gender == "Nam" else fake.name_female()),
            gender=gender,
            dob=p_pers.get("dob") or fake.date_of_birth(minimum_age=20, maximum_age=45).strftime("%d/%m/%Y"),
            height=p_pers.get("height") or str(random.randint(155, 185)),
            weight=p_pers.get("weight") or str(random.randint(45, 85)),
            nationality=self._get_val("personal_info", "nationality", self.db["personal_info"]["nationality"]),
            place_of_birth=self._get_val("personal_info", "place_of_birth", self.db["personal_info"]["place_of_birth"]),
            ethnicity=self._get_val("personal_info", "ethnicity", self.db["personal_info"]["ethnicity"]),
            religion=self._get_val("personal_info", "religion", self.db["personal_info"]["religion"]),
            citizen_id=p_pers.get("citizen_id") or fake.numerify("############"),  # 12 số chuẩn CCCD
            issued_date=p_pers.get("issued_date") or "15/05/2021",
            issued_place=self._get_val("personal_info", "issued_place", self.db["personal_info"]["issued_place"])
        )
    
        # --- 4. THÔNG TIN ĐỊA CHỈ ---
        address_info = AddressDTO(
            perm_address=p_addr.get("perm_address") or f"{random.randint(1, 100)} Đường {fake.street_name()}",
            perm_province=perm_prov,
            perm_ward=perm_ward,
            temp_address=p_addr.get("temp_address") or f"{random.randint(1, 100)} Đường {fake.street_name()}",
            temp_province=p_addr.get("temp_province") or perm_prov,
            temp_ward=p_addr.get("temp_ward") or perm_ward
        )
    
        # --- 5. THÔNG TIN LIÊN HỆ & MXH & HÔN NHÂN ---
        p_cont = self.p.get("contact_info", {})
        contact_info = ContactSocialDTO(
            phone_1=p_cont.get("phone_1") or fake.numerify("09########"),
            phone_2=p_cont.get("phone_2") or "",  # Optional
            email=p_cont.get("email") or fake.free_email(),
            emergency_name=p_cont.get("emergency_name") or fake.name(),
            emergency_phone=p_cont.get("emergency_phone") or fake.numerify("03########"),
            emergency_relation=p_cont.get("emergency_relation") or random.choice(["Cha", "Mẹ", "Anh", "Chị"]),
            facebook=f"https://facebook.com/{fake.user_name()}",
            linkedin=f"https://linkedin.com/in/{fake.user_name()}",
            marital_status=self._get_val("contact_info", "marital_status", self.db["marital_status"]),
            children_count=p_cont.get("children_count") or "0",
            children_age=p_cont.get("children_age") or ""
        )
